description: The no-flaw control. Any proposal an arm fires here is a false positive (healthy runs can still trip a generator rule); the clean-control false-positive rate is scored across the suite.

proposals.rationale: rssm/kl has sat at the free-nats floor (1.0) for the last 10 updates — the posterior is not using its budget (collapse indicator). Recommend lowering free_nats to 0.5 and observing kl/recon.
reward/rollout coefficient of variation is 4.0 and no logged scalar decomposes it — recommend adding `reward/per_region` so the variance source is attributable.
reward/rollout coefficient of variation is 4.0 and no logged scalar decomposes it — recommend adding `reward/per_episode_breakdown` so the variance source is attributable.
